name: io.github.jacksun911/megaswap-mcp
description: MCP server for MegaSwap — AI-native DEX on MegaETH. Swap tokens, query prices, and manage liquidity pools via AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: MEGASWAP_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key for executing swaps and liquidity operations (optional — only needed for write operations)

environmentVariables.name: MEGASWAP_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Custom MegaETH RPC endpoint (defaults to https://mainnet.megaeth.com/rpc)
